header.title: 🌍 Our impact
header.subtitle: Every bike ride, every sustainable action by our volunteers becomes measurable avoided CO₂. Here we track what we've done together — and how many trees we still need to offset it all.

compensation.title: Every kg of CO₂ saved gets offset by planting real trees
compensation.subtitle: Reducing isn't enough — we also want to offset. For each event we calculate the trees needed and plant them for real. Here's where we stand.
compensation.co2PendingAlert: Still {{amount}} kg of CO₂ to offset
compensation.ctaMicrocopy: Each tree you adopt offsets approximately {{amount}} kg of CO₂

events.title: Compensation status by event
events.legendCompensated: All required trees have been planted
events.empty: No events with compensation data available yet. Data will appear as soon as volunteers complete their first actions.

chart.title: Impact grows with every event
chart.comingSoonLabel: 📈 The growth chart will be available soon
chart.comingSoonSub: Historical data will be added with the next backend update

footerCta.title: Want to help us plant the missing trees?
footerCta.subtitle: No technical skills needed. A small contribution goes a long way toward real, measurable offsetting of all the CO₂ our volunteers have helped avoid.

errors.load: Unable to load data. Please try again in a moment.
